case_title: PETER W. CLERIDES VS. STEVEN A. JONES

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY STEVEN A. JONES SET FOR SEP-05-2012 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-26-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THEIR CASE TODAY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFF HOWARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
